name: French Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dry red wine or 3/4 beef broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a 4 to 5 quart ovenproof pot over medium heat.
2. Pat the meat dry with paper towels.
3. Add the meat and all of the vegetables and garlic to the hot oil.
4. Brown the meat on all sides, stirring occasionally.
5. Add liquids and seasonings.
6. Cover tightly and bake for 2 1/2 to 3 hours in a preheated oven at 325°F until the meat is fork tender.
7. Lift the meat to a cutting board.
8. Cover loosely with foil and let stand 10 to 15 minutes.
9. Discard any bay leaves and citrus peel, then skim fat from the sauce.
10. If desired, thicken the sauce by stirring in 3 tablespoons flour mixed with 1/4 cup water.
11. Slice the meat across the grain and serve with the sauce.
